untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'fundamental catalyst confirmed' (e.g., policy announcement, trade agreement) and '3 trading days of breakout persistence' — neither can be expressed using only price/technical indicators. These are external event flags and temporal state tracking beyond the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Translated the breakout + volume confirmation + sustained directional movement using: (1) price crossing pivot levels (r1/s1) as breakout proxies, (2) volume ratio for conviction, (3) ADX > 25 for trend persistence as proxy for '3-day minimum confirmed move'. The fundamental catalyst and counter-signal conditions require external event data not available in technical indicators. Entry timing is post-breakout (after market has voted) which aligns with using crosses_above/below rather than pre-breakout conditions. Position sizing (1.5% of account) should be applied at execution layer.
